column8: No other country celebrates a National Day on 12th June.
column9: In 2002, 'Russia Day" was on a Sunday.
column10: Buses and trains operate as usual in most places on 12th June.
column11: On 12th June, the Russian President gives a speech at midday.
column12: There are only a few firework displays on 12th June.
column13: Some people in other countries also celebrate Russia Day.
column14: The dinner in 2012 helped make some people become better friends.
column15: People celebrated Russia Day more in the past than they do now.
